content_preview.title: Butterfly Network Wins First FDA Clearance for a Blind-Sweep Ultrasound AI That Estimates Gestational Age Without a Trained Sonographer
content_preview.summary: The FDA has cleared Butterfly Network's Gestational Age Tool, the first blind-sweep ultrasound AI authorized for U.S. marketing, letting any healthcare worker estimate fetal age in under two minutes.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has cleared Butterfly Network's fully automated Gestational Age (GA) Tool, making it the first blind-sweep ultrasound AI authorized for the U.S. market, according to a [press release published on March 30, 2026](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260330456365/en/Butterfly-Network-Secures-First-FDA-Clearance-for-Blind-Sweep-Ultrasound-AI-Tool-Marking-a-Major-Stride-for-Womens-Health). The tool is integrated into Butterfly's handheld semicon...
